Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the UP Scholarship 2026-2027 Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 23 July 2026 .
Q2.What is the last date for submitting the hard copy of the UP Scholarship application 2026-2027 ?
The last date for submitting the hard copy is As Per Schedule .
Q3. How can I download the UP Scholarship 2026-2027 Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q4. What is the last date to apply online for UP Scholarship 2026-2027?
The last date to apply online is 21 September 2026.
Q5. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to As Per Schedule .
Q6. How can I apply for UP Scholarship 2026-2027?
tables: UP SCHOLARSHIP PREMATRIC AND POST MATRICS 9&10 11 & 12 AND OTHER COURSES BA BSC MSC BED BTC ONLINE FORM 2026

UP SWD Social Welfare Department, Uttar Pradesh  has released the notification of Post Matric Scholarship 2026-2027 in Uttar Pradesh. Candidates who want to participate in this post matric scholarship of Uttar Pradesh government can apply online from 22 July 2026 till the last date. Apart from Uttar Pradesh, candidates from other states who have taken admission in any college of Uttar Pradesh can also apply. Application for scholarship of undergraduate, post graduate, certificate, diploma and other courses in Uttar Pradesh at Sarkari Result.

Social Welfare Department, Uttar Pradesh UP Other Then Class 12th Course Dashmottar Scholarship Online Form 2026 Uttar Pradesh Scholarship Scheme 2026-27 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 23/07/2026 Last Date for Registration : 21/09/2026 Complete Form Last Date : 21/09/2026 Hard Copy Submit to College Last Date : As per Schedule Correction Date : As Per Schedule Correction Last Date : As per Schedule
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 100/- Female All Category : 100/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Mode.

UP Scholarship Eligibility 2026-2027 Uttar Pradesh Enrolled with School, College, Institution or University Post Matric 11 : Passed Class 10 Exam and Enrolled in Class 11 Post Matric 12 : Passed Class 11 Exam and Enrolled in Class 12 Dashmottar : Under Graduate / Post Graduate / Certificate / Diploma Courses.

UP Scholarship Document Required Fresh Candidates Last Qualifying Exam Mark Sheet Cast Certificate Income Certificate Bank Passbook Fee Receipt Number Annual Non Refundable Amount Enrollment Number Aadhar Card Number Latest Passport Size Scan Photo For Renewal Candidates : Kindly Use Last Year Registration Number to Login to Renewal Section and Enter the Fresh Details

Sarkari Result® : How to Apply Uttar Pradesh UP Scholarship 2026-2027 Online Form UP SWD Social Welfare Department, Uttar Pradesh  has released the notification of Post Matric Scholarship 2026-2027 in Uttar Pradesh. Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the UP SWD Social Welfare Department, Uttar Pradesh Application 2026 Candidate Can Apply Online . Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the UP Scholarship Application 2026 Application Form in Sarkari Result Admission Section. UP Scholarship 2026-2027 Fresh Candidates : Whoever is a new candidate who has taken admission this year should be in class 11, 12 (High School / Intermediate)  2026-2027 & Other Dashmottar Courses UG / PG / Diploma / Certificates course, should apply in fresh. UP Scholarship 2026-2027 Renewal Candidates : Candidates who are already enrolled in any school / college and had applied for scholarships last year will renew their application. Kindly Collect the All Document Before Apply Online. If you are not now of the non refundable Amount, please check your fees receipt OR contact the college / school if there is any confusion. Submit your form to the concerned school / college within 3 days of the completion of the application.
